records.name: SelectContext
records.signature:
SelectContext(
        string? Value, bool IsOpen, bool Searchable, string SearchText,
        bool Multiple, List<string>? Values, bool IsLoading, bool Disabled, bool Clearable, bool Creatable, int MaxDisplayTags,
        EventCallback<string> OnSelect, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, EventCallback<string> OnSearch,
        EventCallback OnClear, EventCallback<string> OnCreateItem,
        string WrapperId, string ContentId, int FocusedIndex, string? FocusedItemId, string? FocusedItemValue,
        EventCallback<int> SetFocusedIndex,
        Action<string, string> RegisterItem, Action<string> UnregisterItem,
        bool Invalid, bool Required)

parameters.name: SearchValue
parameters.description: Optional text used to match against the search input when Searchable is enabled. Falls back to Value.

mdSummary:
# Select

Native-feeling styled dropdown with search and groups.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/select

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Select | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Select | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Select | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| Select | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Select | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Select | Searchable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Multiple | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Values | `List<string>?` | `` |  |
| Select | ValuesChanged | `EventCallback<List<string>?>` | `` |  |
| Select | Clearable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Creatable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | OnCreate | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Select | MaxDisplayTags | `int` | `3` |  |
| Select | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | IsLoading | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SelectContent | Context | `Select.SelectContext` | `default!` |  |
| SelectContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SelectGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | Context | `Select.SelectContext` | `default!` |  |
| SelectItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| SelectItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | SearchValue | `string?` | `` | Optional text used to match against the search input when Searchable is enabled. Falls back to Value. |
| SelectItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

| SelectTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |

| SelectTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Select) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SelectContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SelectGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SelectItem) — RenderFragment slot
